title: MDX Frontmatter Schema for Module 2 - Digital Twin
description: JSON schema for validating MDX frontmatter in Module 2 documentation chapters

id.description: Unique identifier for the chapter (e.g., chapter-1-physics-simulation or index)

title.description: Display title shown at the top of the page

sidebar_label.description: Short label displayed in the sidebar navigation

sidebar_position.description: Sort order in sidebar (0-indexed, where 0 is first)

description.description: SEO meta description for the page

tags.description: Categorization tags for search and filtering

image.description: Optional Open Graph image path (relative to static/)

hide_title.description: Hide the h1 title at the top of the page

hide_table_of_contents.description: Hide the right sidebar table of contents

examples.title: Chapter 1 - Simulating Physics in Gazebo
examples.description: Learn how to simulate physics, gravity, and collisions in Gazebo for realistic humanoid robot testing and validation.
